mapper.select: select id, type, operator, ip_address as ipAddress, module, description, method, request_url as requestUrl, request_params as requestParams, status_code as statusCode, execution_time as executionTime, error_info as errorInfo, browser, os, create_time as createTime from sys_log order by create_time desc limit #{limit}
select type, count(1) as count from sys_log group by type order by count desc
select module, count(1) as count from sys_log where module is not null group by module order by count desc limit 10
select count(1) from sys_log where type = 2 and date(create_time) = curdate()
select count(1) from sys_log where type = 3 and date(create_time) = curdate()
